name: S-17 auto-refresh-daily honors --token-budget and stops fetching when budget exhausted
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch && for s in g h i; do printf '2026-05-20T00:00:00Z' > ".claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/$s.txt"; done && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nexit 0\n' > up.sh && chmod +x up.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/auto-refresh-daily.sh" --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --upstream-stub ./up.sh --token-budget 5 --tokens-per-fetch 2 --emit-telemetry t.jsonl && [ "$(grep -c '"action":"refreshed"' t.jsonl)" -le "2" ] && echo budgeted 1>&2
